name: io.github.arifulislamat/database-mcp-libsql
description: MCP server for libSQL/Turso, local or remote. Read-only by default, row caps, timeouts.

environmentVariables.name: LIBSQL_URL
environmentVariables.description: Database URL (file path or libsql://... remote)

environmentVariables.name: LIBSQL_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Auth token for remote libSQL/Turso databases
